zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard Calthorpe於大約1419年出生在英國英格蘭諾福爾可時，他的父親William Calthorpe53歲，母親Sibilla St Omer46歲。他於1430年之前與Margaret Ermingland結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1438年2月12日在英國英格蘭諾福爾可考可索普享年20歲。

nameMeanings.name: Calthorpe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Richard Calthorpe was born about 1419, in Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, William Calthorpe, was 53 and his mother, Sibilla St Omer, was 46. He married Margaret Ermingland before 1430. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 12 February 1438, in Cockthorpe, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 20.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard Calthorpe est né environ 1419, à Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Calthorpe, avait 53 ans et sa mère, Sibilla St Omer, avait 46 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Ermingland avant 1430. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 12 février 1438, à Cockthorpe, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 20 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Calthorpe(이)가 대략 1419년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Calthorpe(은)는 53세였고, 그의 어머니 Sibilla St Omer(은)는 46세였다. 그는 1430년 이전 Margaret Ermingland(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1438년 2월 12일 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 콕소에서 20세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ele casou-se com Margaret Ermingland antes 1430. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 12 de fevereiro de 1438, em Cockthorpe, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 20 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard Calthorpe родился около 1419 г. в местности норфолк, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William Calthorpe было 53 года, а матери, которую звали Sibilla St Omer, 46. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Ermingland перед 1430 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 12 февраля 1438 г. в местности кокктаурп, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 20 лет.
